title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Lobster&Burger Ltd
body: "Application number 5169  Applicant Burger & Lobster Restaurant Group Limited objected to the name used by Lobster&Burger Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 9 May 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Lobster&Burger Ltd is changed to 13816588, Ltd. "
